sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ بَعْضُ الْمُغَامِرِينَ الِابْتِعَادَ عَنِ الْجَدَاوِلِ الزَّمَنِيَّةِ الصَّارِمَةِ، مُخْتَارِينَ بَدَلًا مِنْ ذَلِكَ عَفْوِيَّةَ السَّفَرِ وَاكْتِشَافَ الْمَجْهُولِ.
sentences.translation: Neki avanturisti više vole da se udalje od strogih vremenskih rasporeda, birajući umjesto toga spontanost putovanja i otkrivanje nepoznatog.
sentences.translationEn: Some adventurers prefer to move away from strict schedules, choosing instead the spontaneity of travel and discovering the unknown.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الرِّحْلَاتِ الَّتِي لَا تَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى تَخْطِيطٍ مَسْبَقٍ تَمْنَحُ الْمُسَافِرَ حُرِّيَّةً كَبِيرَةً فِي تَغْيِيرِ وُجْهَتِهِ بِنَاءً عَلَى نَصِيحَةِ عَابِرِ سَبِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Putovanja koja se ne oslanjaju na prethodno planiranje daju putniku veliku slobodu da promijeni svoje odredište na osnovu savjeta prolaznika.
sentences.translationEn: Trips that do not rely on prior planning give the traveler great freedom to change their destination based on the advice of a passerby.

sentences.arabic: قَدْ يُؤَدِّي الضَّيَاعُ فِي شَوَارِعِ مَدِينَةٍ غَرِيبَةِ إِلَى الْعُثُورِ عَلَى مَقْهًى صَغِيرٍ مَخْفِيٍّ أَوْ سُوقٍ شَعْبِيٍّ يَنْبِضُ بِالْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Gubitak u ulicama stranog grada može dovesti do pronalaska skrivenog malog kafića ili popularne pijace koja pulsira životom.
sentences.translationEn: Getting lost in the streets of a strange city may lead to finding a hidden small cafe or a popular market pulsing with life.

sentences.arabic: وَرُغْمَ أَنَّ هَذَا النَّمَطَ مِنَ السَّفَرِ يَتَطَلَّبُ رُوحًا مَرِنَةً وَقُدْرَةً عَلَى التَّكَيُّفِ مَعَ الظُّرُوفِ الْمُفَاجِئَةِ، إِلَّا أَنَّ مَكَاسِبَهُ النَّفْسِيَّةَ لَا تُقَدَّرُ بِثَمَنٍ.
sentences.translation: Iako ovaj stil putovanja zahtijeva fleksibilan duh i sposobnost prilagođavanja iznenadnim okolnostima, njegovi psihološki dobici su neprocjenjivi.
sentences.translationEn: Although this style of travel requires a flexible spirit and the ability to adapt to sudden circumstances, its psychological gains are priceless.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الِاعْتِمَادُ عَلَى الْخَرَائِطِ الْوَرَقِيَّةِ أَحْيَانًا فِي تَعْزِيزِ حِسِّ الِاتِّجَاهِ وَتَقْوِيَةِ الصِّلَةِ بِالْمَكَانِ بَعِيدًا عَنْ شَاشَاتِ الْهَوَاتِفِ.
sentences.translation: Oslanjanje na papirne mape ponekad pomaže u jačanju osjećaja za orijentaciju i jačanju veze s mjestom, daleko od ekrana telefona.
sentences.translationEn: Relying on paper maps sometimes helps in enhancing the sense of direction and strengthening the connection with the place away from phone screens.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا، تُصْبِحُ الرِّحْلَةُ ذَاتُهَا هِيَ الْهَدَفُ، وَلَيْسَ فَقَطْ نُقْطَةُ الْوُصُولِ النِّهَائِيَّةُ.
sentences.translation: Tako samo putovanje postaje cilj, a ne samo krajnja tačka dolaska.
sentences.translationEn: In this way, the journey itself becomes the goal, not just the final point of arrival.
